name: Horizon Minerals Limited
description: Horizon Minerals Limited is an gold exploration and development company with a key focus in the Kalgoorlie and Coolgardie regions of Western Australia. The company holds a large, highly prospective tenement portfolio in the heart of the Eastern Goldfields, including the flagship Boorara Gold Project. Horizon is actively exploring and developing its assets to transition into a mid-tier gold producer, leveraging its strategic regional landholding and existing infrastructure.
